notes: A more serious, professional redesign — phase one. The blue is now a calmer, muted Adriatic tone (peace and trust, not candy-bright), and lesson/reading text is set in an editorial serif. The bottom bar is simplified from five tabs to four — Today · Learn · Review · Profile — with quizzes and the mock exam moved into Profile beside exam readiness. Words is now Review, Talk is now Tutor, and the Today screen drops the redundant day-navigator so there's one clear next action.
